operating_principles.meaning: Repository artifacts define truth, not chat memory
Progress must be backed by verification or trace
Critical knowledge enters artifacts, not only conversation
When safe, execute the next bounded step
Stop only at owner gate, missing source, or real blocker
Bundle compatible WEB/Admin, trace, state, and verification tasks
Use direct repository work where safe instead of copy-paste loops
Future public-preview fixes refresh the same URL

work_packages.next: Resume only after OS lane is ready

language_and_ux.next: Validate RTL with collapsible mobile panels
Keep technical IDs stable in English
Owner checks phone view after refresh
All panels remain open on wide screens
Define language policy and i18n strategy later

next_actions.label: Owner refreshes fixed URL on mobile and returns PASS or NEEDS FIX
